steps.title: Use the given intercept and slope as points
steps.content: The statement $f(0)=3$ gives the point $(0,3)$. Since the slope is $69$, increasing $x$ by $1$ increases $f(x)$ by $69$, so a second point is $(1,72)$.

steps.title: Fit the line in Desmos
steps.content: Type $y_1\sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=69$ and $b=3$, so $f(x)=69x+3$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice D is the only equation with slope $69$ and $f(0)=3$. Therefore choice D is correct.
